productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Check Pink Shirts
description: CompositionRed and white check shirt with black accents, made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a front buttoned placket, flap pocket on the left chest with branding, and a curved hemFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water inside out using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print/embellishmentsThis check shirt from flying machine adds a fresh twist to everyday formal clothing with its breathable fabric and fashionable cuts. Look dapper in this beautifully designed shirt. Pair this with formal pants, classy leather shoes and accessories, and a jacket for a typical executive touche.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
